title: Quantity Surveying Manager (Tender Lead)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Quantity Surveying Manager to lead a team in tendering for building works projects. The ideal candidate will have a strong track record in quantity surveying, tender management, and team leadership. You'll be responsible for driving tender submissions, managing QS teams, and ensuring projects are pursued with accurate pricing and compliance.

Key Responsibilities:

· Lead tender teams for building works projects, overseeing QS inputs, pricing, and submission.
· Manage and develop Junior/Executive/Senior QS.
· Coordinate with project teams, clients, and subcontractors for tender clarifications and queries.
· Ensure tender submissions are accurate, compliant, and meet client requirements.
· Develop and implement tender strategies, risk assessments, and pricing approaches.
· Monitor tender pipeline, forecast, and report on tender outcomes.

Requirements:

· Degree in Quantity Surveying or equivalent.
· 10+ years of QS experience in construction, with at least 3 years in a leadership role.
· Proven track record in tender management and winning projects.
· Strong knowledge of building works, contracts, and pricing.
· Excellent leadership, communication, and team management skills.
· Proficient in QS software (e.g. Glodon, Bluebeam, etc.)
· Experience with Public and Private Residential Housing project, Institutional projects.
· Familiarity with BIM and digital QS tools.
· Candidates with Professional QS certification will be an advantage.

postedCompany.description:
Wee Poh Construction Co. (Pte) Ltd (WPC) was incorporated in 1977 with its main business in the construction of infrastructure works for the public sector. It was a subsidiary company of Wee Poh Holdings Ltd (WPH) which is a company listed on the SGX.

WPH restructured in 2004 and realigned its focus to other business segment and HLG saw an opportunity to acquire WPC to shore up its construction capability.

The acquisition of WPC was completed in 2005 and became a wholly owned subsidiary of HLC. Sharing the same office with HLC, not only was WPC assimilated into the Ho Lee family and adopts the company culture, it has been certified to comply with current ISO Integrated Quality and Safety Management System following the acquisition and is currently a Grade B2 Contractor registered with BCA under the workhead of CW01. It is also a GB1 Licensed Builders under General Builder Class 1.

Since its acquisition by HLG, WPC has to-date completed several projects in the capacity of a specialist trade sub-contractor and as a Main Contractor, had completed a purposed built 2 Storey Ramp Up Single User Factory at Tuas South Avenue 3/2 Tuas Bay Drive (Lot 03965L MK07). WPC has also in 2012, secured a project as a Main Contractor to construct 394 Units of Executive Condominium Housing Development at Upper Serangoon Road/Upper Serangoon View and in 2013, secured a Main Contract to construct the Michael’s Residence, a project comprising 30 units of Semi-detached Houses and 10 units of Detached Houses complete with ancillary infrastructure works..

Moving forward, WPC foresee the opportunity to acquire more projects in the private sector given the still robust construction demand and will forged forward in its endeavours to become a premium builders.
postedCompany.name: WEE POH CONSTRUCTION CO. (PTE.) LTD.
